metadata.title: LLM Applications: Current Paradigms and the Next Frontier — Hou, Zhao, Wang (2025)
metadata.eyebrow: Research Explainer · Hou, Zhao, Wang · 2025 · Vision paper

hero.headline: LLM applications are splitting into four familiar paradigms, but the real frontier is the protocol stack that connects them
hero.headline_html: LLM applications are splitting into four familiar paradigms, but the real frontier is the protocol stack that connects them
hero.subtitle: This paper maps the current LLM application landscape into four paradigms: LLM app stores, LLM agents, self-hosted LLM services, and LLM-powered devices. The authors argue that each paradigm solves one problem while creating another, and that the next stage of progress depends on a three-layer stack made of infrastructure, protocol, and application layers that reduce fragmentation, improve security, and make the ecosystem more scalable.

references: Hou, X., Zhao, Y., & Wang, H. (2025). LLM Applications: Current Paradigms and the Next Frontier. arXiv. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2503.04596
